If a querist uses the expressions, ^i^:., "I should like to ask,"
"Please tell/' "Your honour may see", and "Kindly predict", his
thoughts are about some association or meeting, his family, profit
and lordship or authority respectively.
ftftJrfir nfir^ srwfcw m ** \
If he says, "Predict," his thought is about victory or travel-
ling. If he says, "Think out and tell my thoughts", it is about his
kinsman ; and if he runs to the astrologer in the midst of a crowd
and speaks "Find out quickly", it is about a thief.
